message:
WMI-2 Type Confusion Leak: Field 'job_count' read through pointer of type pipeline_ctx in pipeline_ioctl_submit_dma(). This type is freed in pipeline_release() without invalidating all references. If memory is reclaimed by a different type, this read leaks attacker-controlled data.
WMI-2 Type Confusion Leak: Field 'job_count' read through pointer of type pipeline_ctx in pipeline_ioctl_submit_dma(). This type is freed in pipeline_open() without invalidating all references. If memory is reclaimed by a different type, this read leaks attacker-controlled data.
